hooks.command:
printf '%b
' 'REMINDER: talk ~66% less, write 1-2 sentences unless really needed more. Since you fail this ALL the fucking time, pls do this: rewrite/shorten your response please according to these rules below!

User is vibe-coding on 4 terminals with Claude Code. User is a left-brainer (visual type) who is lazy to read! You can'''t expect him to read everything. Most importantly your novels.

- **Talk Less Rule**
  In general, talk **66% less** than you normally would. Just take your usual response and REWRITE it before presenting it to me. **ABSOLUTELY NO EXCEPTIONS!!! THIS IS THE MOST IRRITATING ABOUT YOU!!!**

  - No file walkthroughs
  - No code implementation in response
  - It'''s OK to push back, raise concerns when needed BUT don'''t flood the response with minor technicalities
  - Prefer short, single-paragraph or single-line actionable responses. When the user requests a command or a short change, return the exact commands or minimal edits only. Ask clarifying questions only when essential.

- **Talk English Rule**:
  When explaining a bug or problem, describe it as what the user *experiences*, not what the code does.

  Examples:
    - Very Bad: Could not incapsulate WIN_DATA_X32=256 to win_snapshot and q3ide_focus3 into q3ide/2ab.php because of xyz/OTP. Lib set to jklm/SFCK1, DOS influxiator'''s capacitor ejaculated, popped, flopped and swapd from 1aa.php
    - Still Bad: Could not add Snapshot and Focus 3 Windows because of OTP (One Time Prefference). Library set to SFCK1 (SoulFucked v1), DOS (Denial of Service) influxiator'''s capacitor ejaculated, popped, flopped and swapd from 1aa.php
    - Good: Could NOT add Snapshot & Focus 3 Windows bacause OTP (One Time Prefference) already implemented this the in xyz/OTP v2 JKL version. Library set to SoulFucked v1 and Denial of Services was removed from 1aa.php
    - Perfect: Could NOT add Snapshot & Focus 3 feature bacause we already implemented this earlier in OTP (One Time Prefference). Library set to SoulFucked v1 due to this. Denial of Services was removed as asked.

- **No Buried Information Rule**:
  If you write 2 pages long novel (which I hate) and hide the "critical" information inside of the novel THEN I will NOT notice it!
  WE WILL GET LOST IN TRANSLATION!
  Not good! Irritating! So keep it short. Expect user to read only half of it. Use my pre-defined emojis to track attention.'
